user.title: Spot Scheduler
user.description:
Configure Spot Scheduler to schedule devices based on Nord Pool electricity spot prices.

Requires the built-in Nord Pool integration (Home Assistant 2025.1+).

data_description.nordpool_config_entry: Select your configured Nord Pool integration instance.
data_description.expensive_hours_count: This many most expensive hours per day will be highlighted in the schedule view.

devices.title: Select devices
devices.description: Choose the devices you want to schedule. Supported: switches, lights, thermostats, input booleans.

error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.

abort.nordpool_not_found: Nord Pool integration not found. Please set it up first under Settings → Devices & Services.

init.title: Spot Scheduler
init.description: Select the Nord Pool integration and the devices to control. Price thresholds, auto-select, and expensive hours settings are on the device Configuration page.

data_description.nordpool_config_entry: Select which Nord Pool instance provides hourly price data.
data_description.devices: Choose which devices Spot Scheduler can schedule on/off by hour.

nordpool_integration_missing.title: Nord Pool integration removed
nordpool_integration_missing.description: The Nord Pool integration that Spot Scheduler depends on can no longer be found. Please re-add Nord Pool under Settings → Devices & Services, then reload Spot Scheduler.

nordpool_unavailable.title: Nord Pool prices unavailable
nordpool_unavailable.description:
Spot Scheduler could not fetch today's electricity prices. The Nord Pool API may be temporarily unavailable. Prices will be retried automatically.

You can also trigger a manual refresh via **Services → spot_scheduler.refresh_prices**.
